arts.ttl: Club have now spoken to Arsenal man’s entourage about January – Gunners still need convincing
arts.sum: Napoli have now spoken to Arsenal defender Jakub Kiwior’s entourage about a move in the January transfer window but have work to do to convince the Gunners. That’s according to Tuttomercatoweb, who report that Napoli have held a ‘discussion’ with Kiwior’s entourage about a move. arts.ttl: Arsenal and Chelsea make contact ‘in recent days’ to sign Brazil rising star – Real Madrid also in the tussle
arts.sum: Arsenal and Chelsea have made contact ‘in recent days’ for Palmeiras youngster Vitor Reis, but face competition from Real Madrid for him. That’s according to the Brazilian edition of GOAL, who report that Arsenal, Chelsea, Real Madrid and Inter Milan all contacted the youngster’s intermediaries in the last few days in ‘search of first information’. arts.ttl: England’s Thomas Tuchel set for interesting response when calling Arsenal star in 2025
arts.sum: Thomas Tuchel is set to take over as England’s head coach in 2025 and the German boss told the media on Friday that he will attempt to bring Ben White back into the Three Lions fold.
